intent: Close out the clean-break input surface migration without opening a PR, preserving raw input non-authority boundaries and avoiding unrelated dirty worktree changes.

scope.summary: Input model contract, exploratory surface, validator, extension-source-pack, generated/effective publication, capability routing, host projection, and closeout-evidence state required to make the clean-break input migration internally valid on current origin/main.

profile_selection_receipt.selection_rationale: Repo ingress defaults pre-1.0 work to atomic unless a hard gate requires transitional coexistence. This closeout is a single branch-isolated migration closeout with no transitional compatibility gate.
hard_gate_facts: target cleaned is fail-closed until hosted no-PR landing, origin/main containment, local main sync, and branch cleanup evidence exist
extension activation state was not changed; canonical publication refreshed generated extension state because validation proved the copied publication snapshot was stale against origin/main
capability routing and host projections were refreshed only after validation proved generated state stale

included after validate-capability-publication-state.sh and validate-host-projections.sh proved generated state stale; canonical publishers refreshed routing and projections
